stemHtml: Why should a Traffic Advisory (TA) precede a Resolution Advisory (RA)?

options.a: A TA will highlight the approximate position of an aircraft nearby that may become an RA.
options.b: TAs have the ability to create a horizontal traffic avoidance manoeuvre.
options.c: TAs can create a vertical traffic avoidance manoeuvre.
options.d: A TA must always be created before an RA.
